name: property managers handling 5–15 properties/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 properties/month, inconsistent utility data reporting causes unexpected costs. We automate utility data collection and reporting instead of manual tracking of utility bills and usage.
problem_solved: Inconsistent utility data reporting leads to unexpected costs.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inconsistent utility data reporting leads to unexpected costs.
